etymology.description: semantic č‰ą(č‰ą) (cÇŽo, "grass") + phonetic äşĄ(äşĄ) (hĂ i) -> roots of plants
etymology.interpretation: The character čŤ„(hĂ i, "roots") combines the semantic component č‰ą(č‰ą) (cÇŽo, "grass"), which generally indicates plant-related concepts, with the phonetic component äşĄ(äşĄ) (hĂ i), which helps to provide the pronunciation. The character thus relates specifically to the concept of plant roots within the context of grass or vegetation.
